ATTORNEYS AND PARTIES MAY APPEAR, AND MEMBERS OF THE PUBLIC MAY ATTEND, EITHER IN PERSON IN DEPARTMENT 302 OR REMOTELY BY VIDEOCONFERENCE USING ZOOM. TO APPEAR OR ATTEND THE HEARING REMOTELY, GO TO THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG UNDER "ONLINE SERVICES," NAVIGATE TO "TENTATIVE RULINGS," AND CLICK ON THE APPROPRIATE LINK, OR DIAL THE CORRESPONDING PHONE NUMBER. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate, Injunction And/Or Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Nov-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
James R. Sutton, Esq., The Sutton Law Firm, 415-732-7700, jsutton@campaignlawyers.com, for Petitioners, Friends of Lowell Foundation et al
Bradley W. Hertz, Esq., The Sutton Law Firm, 818-593-2949, bhertz@campaignlawyers.com, for Petitioners, Friends of Lowell Foundation et al
Christine A. Linnenbach, Esq. Attorney at Law, 415-637-7171, christine@christinelinnenbach
Suzanne Solomon, Esq, Liebert Cassidy Whitmore, 415.512.3000, ssolomon@lcwlegal.com for Respondents San Francisco Board of Education et al
Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Court reporter.

Court approves media coverage for this matter. (KGO Channel 7 News)

The Court provided to all counsel present a draft order, representing the Courts tentative ruling which is to grant the petition in part prior to the start of today's hearing.

Hsaring held. Not argued. All parties submit to the Courts Tenative ruling. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

PETITIONER FRIENDS OF LOWELL FOUNDATION, LOWELL ALUMNI ASSOCIATION, SAN FRANCISCO TAXPAYERS ASSOCIATION, ASIAN AMERICAN LEGAL FOUNDATION Motion For Writ Of Mandate, Injunction And/Or Declaratory Relief is granted in part. (see scanned order for complete details)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate, Injunction And/Or Declaratory Relief
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Continued To Nov-18-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS FRIENDS OF LOWELL FOUNDATION, LOWELL ALUMNI ASSOCIATION, SAN FRANCISCO TAXPAYERS ASSOCIATION, ASIAN AMERICAN LEGAL FOUNDATION's Motion For Writ Of Mandate, Injunction And/Or Declaratory Relief

Continued on the Court's own motion to Thursday, November 18, at 9:30 a.m. Attorneys and parties may appear, and members of the public may attend, either in person in Department 302 or remotely by videoconference using Zoom. To appear or attend the hearing remotely, go to the court's website at sfsuperiorcourt.org under "Online Services," navigate to "Tentative Rulings," and click on the appropriate link, or dial the corresponding phone number.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
